calendar.matters:
MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSCECUTE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FRANCISCO ISMAEL GARCIA LOPEZ'S MOTION TO DISMISS ACTION for failure to prosecute is granted. No opposition filed.

FORMAL ORDER IS SIGNED.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Or Alternatively, Issue Or Evidence Sanctions
Off Calendar May-10-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; DEFENDANT FRANCISCO LOPEZ'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Or Alternatively, Issue Or Evidence Sanctions IS GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare Order. Judge Pro tem: Stephanie Krmpotic; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/JPT.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Attendance And Testimony Of Plaintiff Younes Elder And Production Of Documents, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling;
DEFENDANT FRANCISCO LOPEZ's Motion To Compel Deposition Attendance And Testimony Of Plaintiff Younes Elder And Production Of Documents, And For Monetary Sanctions is granted. Plaintiff Younes Elder shall, within 10 days, appear at his deposition and produce the documents requested in the deposition notice. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,933.00. Prevailing party to prepare Order. Judge Pro tem: Thomas A. Cohen; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/jpt.
